markets.no_sub_title: Iga Swiatek
markets.rules_primary: If Iga Swiatek wins the Day vs Swiatek professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA Indian Wells Round Of 64 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Day vs Swiatek professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA Indian Wells Round Of 64 after a ball has been played.
